mapper.sql: rt.re_id as rr_id, rt.train_name, rt.start_time, rt.end_time, rt.train_content, rt.train_type, rt.train_time, rt.train_address, rt.train_company, rt.certificate, rt.lecturer, rt.lecturer_information, rt.remarks, rt.attribute1, rt.attribute2, rt.attribute3, rt.enabled_flag, rt.id, rt.update_time, rt.create_time, rt.update_by, rt.create_by, rt.train_time_new

${tAlias}.re_id as ${tAlias}_rr_id, ${tAlias}.train_name as ${tAlias}_train_name, ${tAlias}.start_time as ${tAlias}_start_time, ${tAlias}.end_time as ${tAlias}_end_time, ${tAlias}.train_content as ${tAlias}_train_content, ${tAlias}.train_type as ${tAlias}_train_type, ${tAlias}.train_time as ${tAlias}_train_time, ${tAlias}.train_address as ${tAlias}_train_address, ${tAlias}.train_company as ${tAlias}_train_company, ${tAlias}.certificate as ${tAlias}_certificate, ${tAlias}.lecturer as ${tAlias}_lecturer, ${tAlias}.lecturer_information as ${tAlias}_lecturer_information, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.train_time_new as ${tAlias}_train_time_new
mapper.insert: insert into re_train (re_id, train_name, start_time, end_time, train_content, train_type, train_time, train_address, train_company, certificate, lecturer, lecturer_information, remarks, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, update_time, create_time, update_by, create_by, train_time_new) values (#{recruitment.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{trainName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{endTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{trainContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trainType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trainTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trainAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trainCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{certificate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lecturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lecturerInformation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{trainTimeNew,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update re_train set re_id = #{recruitment.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, train_name = #{trainName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=DATE}, end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=DATE}, train_content = #{trainContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, train_type = #{trainType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, train_time = #{trainTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, train_address = #{trainAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, train_company = #{trainCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, certificate = #{certificate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, lecturer = #{lecturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, lecturer_information = #{lecturerInformation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
